name: The Law Office Of M. Sean Cydrus LLC
description_short: Columbus-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings with 18 years of experience. Offers personal consultations and competitive flat fees starting at $500.
description_long:
The Law Office of M. Sean Cydrus, LLC is a bankruptcy law practice based in Columbus, Ohio, with an additional office in Chillicothe. Founded 18 years ago, the firm focuses exclusively on helping individuals navigate personal bankruptcy relief. According to their website, they serve clients experiencing financial stress from job loss, medical bills, mortgage difficulties, divorce, or other circumstances beyond their control.

The firm offers personal bankruptcy filing services, primarily Chapter 7 bankruptcies, with legal consultations to help clients understand their financial options. They provide free initial consultations in a comfortable setting with complimentary beverages, designed to reduce client stress and answer questions about the bankruptcy process. Their stated approach emphasizes personal attention and compassionate representation rather than high-volume processing.

M. Sean Cydrus distinguishes his practice through competitive pricing and a personal touch. The firm advertises Chapter 7 fees starting as low as $500, claiming to be the most reasonably priced after client comparisons with competitors. They emphasize compassionate, individualized service and highlight their ability to explain complex bankruptcy concepts in accessible terms during no-pressure consultations.

The practice appears legitimate and established, with 18 years in business and client testimonials. However, the website provides limited detail about Chapter 13 filings, specific eligibility criteria, or post-bankruptcy services. Prospective clients should expect to discuss their specific situation during consultation to understand actual fees and whether Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 is appropriate for their circumstances.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive Chapter 7 fees starting at $500, marketed as lowest-priced after client comparison shopping
18 years of established experience in bankruptcy law
Free initial consultation with no-pressure, comfortable environment
Two office locations (Columbus and Chillicothe) for client convenience
Personal approach emphasizing compassionate, individualized representation
Client testimonial indicating high satisfaction and appreciation
Complimentary beverages and stress-reduced consultation environment
cons: Website lacks detail on Chapter 13 filing services and costs
Limited information about post-bankruptcy counseling or financial planning
No pricing transparency for complex cases or unexpected complications
Minimal details on eligibility requirements or means test information
No mention of payment plans or financing options for legal fees
best_for: Ohio residents in Columbus or Chillicothe area seeking Chapter 7 bankruptcy with budget-conscious pricing
Individuals overwhelmed by sudden financial hardship (job loss, medical bills, divorce) needing personal guidance
Debtors wanting attorney representation with emphasis on compassion over high-volume processing
Bankruptcy filers seeking transparent, competitively-priced legal services without pressure sales
diagnosis: Best for Ohio residents experiencing sudden financial hardship who want personalized bankruptcy representation at competitive pricing. Main caveat: website lacks critical pricing details for Chapter 13 cases and doesn't specify whether advertised $500 fee applies to all Chapter 7 situations or only simple cases; contact required to confirm actual costs and services for individual circumstances.
services: Client support through bankruptcy process completion
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
